docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-14-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-17-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2008 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-29-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ORDERED TO SHOW GOOD CAUSE WHY JUDGMENT FOR $3300.00 FOR NON-PAYMENT OF AMOUNTS DUE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT APPEAR, THE COURT WILL ENTER JUDGMENT FOR $3300.00. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2009 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,100.00 FILED BY GUERRERO, CLARITA AS TO DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED CLAIM FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-10-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT PER MEDIATION AGREEMENT OF APRIL 29, 2008. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2008 - CONTINUED FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-23-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. CONTINUED PER THE COURT ORDER DATED APRIL 29, 2008 FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT PER MEDIATION AGREEMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUERRERO, CLARITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,780.00, DEFENDANT LEONILA YPIL NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2009; JUDGMENT DEBTOR YPIL, LEONILA FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00.
AMENDED CLAIM FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-23-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ALREADY PAID $1400. DEFENDANT TO PAY REMAINING AS FOLLOWS: $400 ON 7/15/09; $500 ON 8/11/09 AND $500 ON 9/4/09, PLAINTIFF WILL THEN FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORTS TO THE FOLLOWING DATES : 8/20/09 AND 9/10/09.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2009 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON MONTHLY PAYMENTS. CONTINUE TO 9/10/09 FOR NEXT PROGRESS REPORT.
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-17-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-28-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-04-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-14-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK M. SCHWARTZ-SCOTT; NOT REPORTED (506) EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCE CONTINUE TO JUNE 2008 FOR DISMISSAL.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-27-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PRO TEM COMM.: ALAN SILVERMAN, CLERK, MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NO APPEARANCES. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUN-01-2009 BY PERSONAL SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) AS TO DEFENDANT YPIL, LEONILA
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2009 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-02-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2009 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-09-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT PRESENT, BENCH LETTER IS WITHDRAWN. DEFENDANT TO BRING PROOF THAT SHE HAS BEEN PAYING JUDGMENT THROUGH PAYROLL DEDUCTION. ALSO, TO BRING IN FINANCIAL INFORMATION.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2009 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO SEP-10-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PAYMENT OF $500 PER MONTH. IF FULLY PAID PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
